loader.HTML:
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html>
<head>
    <meta charset="UTF-8">
    <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
    <meta name="myop:size" content='{"width":"100%","height":"100%"}'>

    <script type="myop/types">
        // =============================================================================
        // MYOP COMPONENT TYPE DEFINITIONS
        // =============================================================================

        interface TestDto {
            name: string;
            data: any;
        }

        interface InputMethod {
            method_name: string;
            dto_schema?: object;
            test_dtos: TestDto[];
        }

        /**
         * Data structure passed to myop_init_interface(data)
         */
        interface MyopInitData {
            componentName: string;
            status: string;
            contactEmail: string;
            description: string;
            input_methods: InputMethod[];
            /** HTML source code of the component to render in preview iframe */
            componentCode?: string;
        }

        /**
         * Actions and payloads for myop_cta_handler(action, payload)
         */
        interface MyopCtaPayloads {
            'claim': void;
            'delete_test_dto': { methodName: string; dtoName: string };
            'duplicate_test_dto': { methodName: string; originalName: string; newName: string; dtoData: any };
            'save_test_dto': { methodName: string; dtoName: string | null; isNew: boolean; newName: string; dtoData: any };
            'size-requested': {
                width?: number | null;
                height?: number | null;
                minWidth?: number | null;
                maxWidth?: number | null;
                minHeight?: number | null;
                maxHeight?: number | null;
                required?: boolean;
            };
            'test_dto_selected': { method_name: string; dto_data: any };
        }

        // =============================================================================
        // DO NOT EDIT BELOW - Standard Myop type declarations
        // =============================================================================

        declare function myop_init_interface(): MyopInitData;
        declare function myop_init_interface(data: MyopInitData): void;

        declare function myop_cta_handler<K extends keyof MyopCtaPayloads>(
            action: K,
            payload: MyopCtaPayloads[K]
        ): void;
    </script>

    <link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.googleapis.com">
    <link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.gstatic.com" crossorigin>
    <link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=DM+Sans:ital,opsz,wght@0,9..40,100..1000;1,9..40,100..1000&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">

    <style>
        * {
            box-sizing: border-box;
            margin: 0;
            padding: 0;
        }

        html, body {
            width: 100%;
            height: 100%;
            overflow: hidden;
            font-family: 'DM Sans', sans-serif;
            -webkit-font-smoothing: antialiased;
            -moz-osx-font-smoothing: grayscale;
            background: #fff;
        }

        :root {
            --purple-5: #F0E8FF;
            --purple-10: #DECCFF;
            --purple-20: #CAACFF;
            --purple-40: #B996F6;
            --purple-100: #6C18FF;
            --grey-20: #D3D1D5;
            --grey-90: #3E3D3E;
            --white: #FFF;
            --black: #0A090A;
            --border-color: #e5e5e5;
            --bg-color: #ffffff;
            --accent-red: #ef4444;
            --text-color: #18181b;
            --panel-bg: #FAFAFA;
            --code-bg: #f5f5f5;
            --code-color: #333;
        }

        #loader-container {
            display: flex;
            justify-content: center;
            align-items: center;
            height: 100%;
            width: 100%;
        }

        .loader-spinner {
            width: 32px;
            height: 32px;
            border: 3px solid #D3D1D5;
            border-top-color: #DECCFF;
            border-radius: 50%;
            animation: spin 0.8s linear infinite;
        }

        @keyframes spin {
            to { transform: rotate(360deg); }
        }

        #app-root {
            width: 100%;
            height: 100%;
            display: flex;
            flex-direction: column;
            opacity: 0;
            transition: opacity 0.2s ease-in;
        }

        #app-root.loaded {
            opacity: 1;
        }

        /* ===== TOP BAR ===== */
        .top-bar {
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            justify-content: space-between;
            padding: 12px 16px;
            border-bottom: 1px solid #E5E4E4;
            height: 60px;
            flex-shrink: 0;
            background: #fff;
        }

        .top-bar-title {
            font-size: 16px;
            font-weight: 500;
            line-height: 24px;
            color: #1C1B1F;
        }

        .content-layout {
            display: flex;
            flex: 1;
            min-height: 0;
        }

        /* ===== LEFT SIDEBAR ===== */
        .sidebar {
            width: 456px;
            min-width: 456px;
            display: flex;
            flex-direction: column;
            padding: 9px 16px 12px 16px;
            overflow: hidden;
            background: #F8F8F8;
        }

        /* Toggle button container */
        .sidebar-toggle-container {
            display: flex;
            flex-direction: row;
            align-items: center;
            justify-content: flex-end;
            align-self: stretch;
            margin-bottom: 2px;
        }

        .sidebar-toggle-btn {
            background: transparent;
            border: none;
            padding: 4px;
            cursor: pointer;
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            justify-content: center;
            border-radius: 4px;
            transition: all 0.15s ease;
        }

        .sidebar-toggle-btn:hover {
            background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.05);
        }

        .sidebar-toggle-btn:active {
            transform: scale(0.95);
        }

        .sidebar-toggle-btn svg {
            display: block;
        }

        /* Sidebar content wrapper */
        .sidebar-content {
            display: flex;
            flex-direction: column;
            gap: 20px;
            flex: 1;
            min-height: 0;
            padding: 47px 16px 20px 16px;
            overflow-y: auto;
            scrollbar-width: none;
            -ms-overflow-style: none;
        }

        .sidebar-content::-webkit-scrollbar {
            display: none;
        }

        /* Resize handle */
        .sidebar-resize-handle {
            width: 4px;
            cursor: col-resize;
            background: transparent;
            position: relative;
            flex-shrink: 0;
            z-index: 10;
            transition: background 0.15s ease;
        }

        .sidebar-resize-handle:hover,
        .sidebar-resize-handle.dragging {
            background: rgba(139, 92, 246, 0.3);
        }

        .sidebar-resize-handle::before {
            content: '';
            position: absolute;
            left: -3px;
            right: -3px;
            top: 0;
            bottom: 0;
        }

        /* Minimized sidebar state */
        .sidebar.minimized {
            width: 49px !important;
            min-width: 49px !important;
            max-width: 49px !important;
            padding: 9px 0 20px;
            align-items: center;
        }

        .sidebar.minimized .sidebar-content {
            display: none !important;
        }

        .sidebar.minimized .sidebar-toggle-container {
            justify-content: center;
        }

        .sidebar.minimized .sidebar-toggle-btn {
            width: 21px;
            height: 21px;
            padding: 4px;
            justify-content: center;
            align-items: center;
            box-sizing: content-box;
        }

        /* Tooltip */
        .button-tooltip {
            position: fixed;
            background: var(--white, #FFF);
            color: var(--black, #0A090A);
            border-radius: 4px;
            border: 1px solid var(--grey-20, #D3D1D5);
            box-shadow: 0 4px 12px 0 rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.12);
            display: inline-flex;
            padding: 6px 8px;
            align-items: center;
            gap: 4px;
            font-family: "DM Sans", sans-serif;
            font-size: 12px;
            font-weight: 400;
            line-height: 14px;
            white-space: nowrap;
            z-index: 2147483647;
            pointer-events: none;
            opacity: 0;
            transition: opacity 0.3s ease;
        }

        .button-tooltip.show {
            opacity: 1;
        }

        .illustration {
            width: 56px;
            height: 57px;
            flex-shrink: 0;
        }

        .illustration svg {
            width: 100%;
            height: 100%;
        }

        .header-section {
            display: flex;
            flex-direction: column;
            gap: 4px;
            flex-shrink: 0;
        }

        .component-title {
            font-size: 24px;
            font-weight: 500;
            line-height: 32px;
            color: #1C1B1F;
        }

        .status-badge {
            font-size: 14px;
            font-weight: 600;
            line-height: 18px;
            background: linear-gradient(90deg, #9747FF 0%, #FF6B6B 100%);
            -webkit-background-clip: text;
            -webkit-text-fill-color: transparent;
            background-clip: text;
            width: fit-content;
        }

        .content-area {
            display: flex;
            flex-direction: column;
            gap: 32px;
            padding-top: 32px;
        }

        .section {
            display: flex;
            flex-direction: column;
            gap: 4px;
        }

        .section-title {
            font-size: 16px;
            font-weight: 700;
            line-height: 24px;
            color: #3E3D3E;
        }

        .section-text {
            font-size: 14px;
            font-weight: 400;
            line-height: 18px;
            color: #3E3D3E;
        }

        .section-text.clamp {
            display: -webkit-box;
            -webkit-line-clamp: 3;
            -webkit-box-orient: vertical;
            overflow: hidden;
            text-overflow: ellipsis;
        }

        /* ===== TEST DATA SCENARIOS ===== */
        .scenarios-section {
            display: flex;
            flex-direction: column;
            gap: 8px;
        }

        .scenarios-box {
            border: 1px solid var(--grey-20);
            border-radius: 4px;
            padding: 13px;
            display: flex;
            flex-direction: column;
            gap: 9px;
            background: var(--white);
            overflow: visible;
        }

        /* Test DTO list container */
        .test-dto-list {
            margin: 0;
            display: flex;
            flex-wrap: wrap;
            gap: 8px;
            overflow: visible;
        }

        .test-dto-list:empty {
            display: none;
        }

        /* Individual scenario button (matches componentBuilder btn-small) */
        button.btn-small {
            width: auto;
            padding: 4px 8px;
            font-size: 11px;
            margin: 0;
            border-radius: 12px;
            background: var(--purple-5);
            border: 1px solid var(--border-color);
            font-weight: 500;
            cursor: pointer;
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            gap: 4px;
            position: relative;
            font-family: 'DM Sans', sans-serif;
            color: var(--grey-90);
            transition: padding-right 0.15s ease, margin-right 0.15s ease, border-color 0.15s ease;
        }

        button.btn-small:hover {
            padding-right: 24px;
            border-color: var(--purple-40);
            z-index: 10;
        }

        button.btn-small .dto-edit-icon {
            position: absolute;
            right: -4px;
            flex-shrink: 0;
            opacity: 0;
            transition: opacity 0.15s ease, right 0.15s ease, color 0.15s ease;
            padding: 4px;
            border-radius: 4px;
            color: var(--grey-90);
            box-sizing: content-box;
        }

        button.btn-small .dto-name {
            transition: margin-right 0.15s ease;
            max-width: 180px;
            overflow: hidden;
            text-overflow: ellipsis;
            white-space: nowrap;
        }

        button.btn-small:hover .dto-name {
            margin-right: 4px;
        }

        button.btn-small:hover .dto-edit-icon {
            opacity: 1;
            right: 6px;
        }

        button.btn-small .dto-edit-icon:hover {
            color: var(--purple-100);
        }

        /* Default data button */
        button.btn-small.default-dto:hover {
            padding-right: 8px; /* No expansion on hover */
        }

        button.btn-small.default-dto .dto-name {
            font-style: italic;
        }

        button.btn-small.default-dto:hover .dto-name {
            margin-right: 0; /* No margin shift */
        }

        /* Active/selected tag states */
        button.btn-small.dto-active {
            background: var(--purple-40);
            border-color: var(--purple-40);
        }

        button.btn-small.dto-active .dto-edit-icon {
            color: var(--black);
        }

        button.btn-small.dto-active .dto-edit-icon:hover {
            color: var(--black);
        }

        /* Last element in row - don't expand */
        button.btn-small.last-in-row:hover {
            padding-right: 8px !important;
        }

        button.btn-small.last-in-row .dto-edit-icon {
            right: 4px !important;
            top: 50%;
            transform: translateY(-50%);
            background: var(--purple-5);
            padding: 2px 4px !important;
        }

        button.btn-small.last-in-row:hover .dto-edit-icon {
            opacity: 1;
            right: 4px !important;
        }

        button.btn-small.last-in-row:hover .dto-name {
            margin-right: 0 !important;
        }

        button.btn-small.last-in-row.dto-active .dto-edit-icon {
            background: var(--purple-40);
        }

        /* Add Scenario button (matches componentBuilder test-dto-add-btn) */
        button.test-dto-add-btn {
            display: flex;
            padding: 8px 0;
            flex-direction: column;
            align-items: flex-start;
            gap: 10px;
            background: transparent;
            border: none;
            color: var(--grey-90);
            text-align: right;
            font-family: 'DM Sans', sans-serif;
            font-size: 12px;
            font-style: normal;
            font-weight: 500;
            line-height: 12px;
            letter-spacing: 0.064px;
            margin-top: auto;
            cursor: pointer;
            transition: none;
        }

        button.test-dto-add-btn:hover {
            padding-left: 0;
            border-color: transparent;
            background: transparent;
            color: #9747FF;
        }

        /* ===== CLAIM BUTTON ===== */
        .claim-btn {
            display: inline-flex;
            align-items: center;
            justify-content: center;
            padding: 6px 12px;
            height: 32px;
            background-color: var(--grey-90, #3E3D3E);
            border: 1px solid var(--grey-90, #3E3D3E);
            border-radius: 6px;
            font-family: 'DM Sans', sans-serif;
            font-size: 13px;
            font-weight: 500;
            line-height: 1;
            color: var(--white);
            cursor: pointer;
            flex-shrink: 0;
            transition: all 0.2s ease;
        }

        .claim-btn:hover {
            background-color: #9747FF;
            border-color: #9747FF;
        }

        /* ===== RIGHT PREVIEW PANEL (STAGE) ===== */
        .preview-panel {
            flex: 1;
            min-width: 0;
            border-left: 1px solid #E5E4E4;
            background: #fff;
            display: flex;
            flex-direction: column;
            overflow: hidden;
        }

        .stage-content {
            flex: 1;
            min-height: 0;
            overflow: auto;
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            justify-content: center;
            padding: 8px;
            scrollbar-width: none;
            -ms-overflow-style: none;
        }

        .stage-content::-webkit-scrollbar {
            display: none;
        }

        .stage-empty {
            display: flex;
            flex-direction: column;
            align-items: center;
            gap: 12px;
            color: #A1A0A3;
            text-align: center;
        }

        .stage-empty-icon {
            width: 48px;
            height: 48px;
            opacity: 0.4;
        }

        .stage-empty-text {
            font-size: 14px;
            font-weight: 400;
            line-height: 20px;
        }

        .stage-empty-hint {
            font-size: 12px;
            font-weight: 400;
            line-height: 16px;
            color: #C4C3C5;
        }

        .stage-rendered {
            width: 100%;
            height: 100%;
            display: none;
            border: none;
            background: #fff;
        }

        .stage-rendered.active {
            display: block;
        }

        /* ===== DTO EDITOR MODAL ===== */
        .modal-overlay {
            position: fixed;
            top: 0;
            left: 0;
            width: 100%;
            height: 100%;
            background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.5);
            display: none;
            justify-content: center;
            align-items: center;
            z-index: 10000;
        }

        .modal-content {
            display: flex;
            width: 600px;
            min-width: 120px;
            max-width: 90vw;
            padding: 4px;
            flex-direction: column;
            align-items: flex-start;
            flex-shrink: 0;
            border-radius: 8px;
            background: var(--white);
            box-shadow: 0 0 12px 0 rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.12);
            max-height: 90vh;
        }

        .modal-header {
            padding: 16px;
            border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border-color);
            width: 100%;
            align-self: stretch;
        }

        .modal-header h2 {
            margin: 0;
            font-size: 16px;
            font-weight: 600;
        }

        .modal-body {
            padding: 16px;
            overflow-y: auto;
            display: flex;
            flex-direction: column;
            width: 100%;
            align-self: stretch;
            flex: 1;
        }

        .modal-body label {
            font-weight: 500;
            font-size: 12px;
            margin-bottom: 5px;
            font-family: 'DM Sans', sans-serif;
            color: var(--text-color);
        }

        .modal-body input[type="text"] {
            width: 100%;
            height: 44px;
            padding: 8px 12px;
            border: 1px solid #D3D1D5;
            border-radius: 4px;
            margin-bottom: 15px;
            font-size: 14px;
            line-height: 18px;
            font-family: 'DM Sans', sans-serif;
            background: #FFF;
            transition: all 0.15s ease;
            text-overflow: ellipsis;
        }

        .modal-body input[type="text"]:hover {
            border: 1px solid var(--purple-40);
            background: #F9F6FF;
        }

        .modal-body input[type="text"]:focus {
            outline: none;
            border: 1px solid var(--purple-40);
            background: #F9F6FF;
        }

        .modal-body input[type="text"].error {
            border: 1px solid var(--accent-red) !important;
        }

        #dto-data-editor {
            width: 100%;
            height: 250px;
            font-family: 'SF Mono', 'Monaco', 'Cascadia Code', "Courier New", Courier, monospace;
            font-size: 12px;
            line-height: 1.6;
            border: 1px solid var(--border-color);
            border-radius: 8px;
            padding: 8px;
            resize: vertical;
            color: var(--text-color);
        }

        #dto-data-editor:focus {
            outline: none;
            border: 1px solid var(--border-color);
        }

        #dto-json-error {
            color: var(--accent-red);
            font-size: 12px;
            margin-top: 5px;
            display: none;
        }

        .modal-footer {
            padding: 16px;
            border-top: 1px solid var(--border-color);
            display: flex;
            justify-content: space-between;
            background: var(--panel-bg);
            width: 100%;
            align-self: stretch;
        }

        .modal-footer .left-group {
            display: flex;
            gap: 10px;
        }

        .modal-footer .right-group {
            display: flex;
            gap: 10px;
        }

        .modal-footer button {
            border-radius: 6px;
            border: 1px solid var(--grey-20);
            background: var(--white);
            display: flex;
            height: 32px;
            padding: 6px 12px;
            justify-content: center;
            align-items: center;
            gap: 4px;
            width: auto;
            font-weight: 500;
            font-size: 13px;
            font-family: 'DM Sans', sans-serif;
            transition: all 0.15s ease;
            cursor: pointer;
            color: var(--text-color);
        }

        .modal-footer button:hover {
            background: var(--purple-5);
            border-color: var(--purple-10);
        }

        .modal-footer-note {
            font-size: 11px;
            color: #A1A0A3;
            align-self: center;
        }

        /* ===== SCROLLBARS ===== */
        ::-webkit-scrollbar {
            width: 12px;
            height: 12px;
        }

        ::-webkit-scrollbar-track {
            background: transparent;
        }

        ::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb {
            background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.15);
            border-radius: 6px;
            border: 3px solid transparent;
            background-clip: padding-box;
        }

        ::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb:hover {
            background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.25);
            border: 3px solid transparent;
            background-clip: padding-box;
        }
    </style>
</head>
<body>
<div id="button-tooltip" class="button-tooltip"></div>
<div id="loader-container">
    <div class="loader-spinner"></div>
</div>

<div id="app-root">
    <!-- TOP BAR -->
    <div class="top-bar">
        <h1 class="top-bar-title">Implementation Request</h1>
        <button class="claim-btn" id="claim-btn" data-tooltip="Save this implementation to your components">Claim</button>
    </div>

    <!-- CONTENT LAYOUT -->
    <div class="content-layout">
        <!-- LEFT SIDEBAR -->
        <div class="sidebar">
            <div class="sidebar-toggle-container">
                <button id="sidebar-toggle" class="sidebar-toggle-btn" data-tooltip="Close left panel">
                    <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="13" height="13" viewBox="0 0 13 13" fill="none">
                        <g clip-path="url(#clip0_500_256)">
                            <path d="M1.625 1.21875H11.375C12.0481 1.21875 12.5938 1.7644 12.5938 2.4375V10.5625C12.5938 11.2356 12.0481 11.7812 11.375 11.7812H1.625C0.951903 11.7812 0.40625 11.2356 0.40625 10.5625V2.4375C0.40625 1.7644 0.951903 1.21875 1.625 1.21875Z" stroke="#3E3D3E" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"/>
                            <path d="M6.09375 1.21875V11.7812" stroke="#3E3D3E" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"/>
                            <path d="M4.0625 6.5H2.4375" stroke="#3E3D3E" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"/>
                            <path d="M4.0625 4.0625H2.4375" stroke="#3E3D3E" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"/>
                            <path d="M4.0625 8.9375H2.4375" stroke="#3E3D3E" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"/>
                        </g>
                        <defs>
                            <clipPath id="clip0_500_256">
                                <rect width="13" height="13" fill="white"/>
                            </clipPath>
                        </defs>
                    </svg>
                </button>
            </div>
            <div class="sidebar-content">
                <div class="illustration">
                    <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="56" height="57" viewBox="0 0 56 57" fill="none">
                        <path d="M0.932129 29.791C0.932129 23.1636 6.30471 17.791 12.9321 17.791H31.173C37.8004 17.791 43.173 23.1636 43.173 29.791V44.9709C43.173 51.5983 37.8004 56.9709 31.173 56.9709H12.9321C6.30471 56.9709 0.932129 51.5983 0.932129 44.9709V29.791Z" fill="url(#paint0_linear_4046_239072)" fill-opacity="0.4"/>
                        <path d="M0.932129 26.6677C0.932129 21.7652 4.90636 17.791 9.80882 17.791H34.2963C39.1987 17.791 43.173 21.7652 43.173 26.6677C43.173 31.5702 39.1987 35.5444 34.2963 35.5444H9.80882C4.90636 35.5444 0.932129 31.5702 0.932129 26.6677Z" fill="url(#paint1_linear_4046_239072)" fill-opacity="0.4"/>
                        <path d="M15.4922 17.8438C15.4922 14.4417 18.2501 11.6838 21.6522 11.6838C25.0543 11.6838 27.8122 14.4417 27.8122 17.8438" stroke="url(#paint2_linear_4046_239072)" stroke-width="3"/>
                        <path d="M6.68628 25.1543C6.68628 18.5269 12.0589 13.1543 18.6863 13.1543H36.9271C43.5545 13.1543 48.9271 18.5269 48.9271 25.1543V40.3342C48.9271 46.9616 43.5545 52.3342 36.9271 52.3342H18.6863C12.0589 52.3342 6.68628 46.9616 6.68628 40.3342V25.1543Z" fill="url(#paint3_linear_4046_239072)" fill-opacity="0.4"/>
                        <path d="M6.68628 22.031C6.68628 17.1285 10.6605 13.1543 15.563 13.1543H40.0504C44.9529 13.1543 48.9271 17.1285 48.9271 22.031C48.9271 26.9335 44.9529 30.9077 40.0504 30.9077H15.563C10.6605 30.9077 6.68628 26.9335 6.68628 22.031Z" fill="url(#paint4_linear_4046_239072)" fill-opacity="0.4"/>
                        <path d="M12.8799 19.6055C12.8799 12.978 18.2525 7.60547 24.8799 7.60547H43.1207C49.7481 7.60547 55.1207 12.9781 55.1207 19.6055V34.7854C55.1207 41.4128 49.7481 46.7854 43.1207 46.7854H24.8799C18.2525 46.7854 12.8799 41.4128 12.8799 34.7854V19.6055Z" fill="url(#paint5_linear_4046_239072)"/>
                        <path d="M12.8799 16.4822C12.8799 11.5797 16.8541 7.60547 21.7566 7.60547H46.244C51.1465 7.60547 55.1207 11.5797 55.1207 16.4822C55.1207 21.3846 51.1465 25.3589 46.244 25.3589H21.7566C16.8541 25.3589 12.8799 21.3846 12.8799 16.4822Z" fill="url(#paint6_linear_4046_239072)"/>
                        <path d="M27.4399 7.66016C27.4399 4.25808 30.1979 1.50016 33.5999 1.50016C37.002 1.50016 39.7599 4.25808 39.7599 7.66016" stroke="url(#paint7_linear_4046_239072)" stroke-width="3"/>
                        <defs>
                            <linearGradient id="paint0_linear_4046_239072" x1="50.7143" y1="17.791" x2="11.0555" y2="61.9433" gradientUnits="userSpaceOnUse">
                                <stop offset="0.08" stop-color="#FF8651"/>
                                <stop offset="0.504183" stop-color="#FFBEA8"/>
                                <stop offset="0.97139" stop-color="#A397F5"/>
                            </linearGradient>
                            <linearGradient id="paint1_linear_4046_239072" x1="50.7143" y1="17.791" x2="38.0926" y2="48.8019" gradientUnits="userSpaceOnUse">
                                <stop offset="0.08" stop-color="#FF8651"/>
                                <stop offset="0.504183" stop-color="#FFBEA8"/>
                                <stop offset="0.97139" stop-color="#A397F5"/>
                            </linearGradient>
                            <linearGradient id="paint2_linear_4046_239072" x1="21.1106" y1="17.8438" x2="21.8327" y2="11.7815" gradientUnits="userSpaceOnUse">
                                <stop offset="0.08" stop-color="#FF8651"/>
                                <stop offset="0.504183" stop-color="#FFBEA8"/>
                                <stop offset="0.97139" stop-color="#A397F5"/>
                            </linearGradient>
                            <linearGradient id="paint3_linear_4046_239072" x1="56.4685" y1="13.1543" x2="16.8097" y2="57.3066" gradientUnits="userSpaceOnUse">
                                <stop offset="0.08" stop-color="#FF8651"/>
                                <stop offset="0.504183" stop-color="#FFBEA8"/>
                                <stop offset="0.97139" stop-color="#A397F5"/>
                            </linearGradient>
                            <linearGradient id="paint4_linear_4046_239072" x1="56.4685" y1="13.1543" x2="43.8468" y2="44.1652" gradientUnits="userSpaceOnUse">
                                <stop offset="0.08" stop-color="#FF8651"/>
                                <stop offset="0.504183" stop-color="#FFBEA8"/>
                                <stop offset="0.97139" stop-color="#A397F5"/>
                            </linearGradient>
                            <linearGradient id="paint5_linear_4046_239072" x1="62.6621" y1="7.60548" x2="23.0033" y2="51.7578" gradientUnits="userSpaceOnUse">
                                <stop offset="0.08" stop-color="#FF8651"/>
                                <stop offset="0.504183" stop-color="#FFBEA8"/>
                                <stop offset="0.97139" stop-color="#A397F5"/>
                            </linearGradient>
                            <linearGradient id="paint6_linear_4046_239072" x1="62.6621" y1="7.60547" x2="50.0404" y2="38.6163" gradientUnits="userSpaceOnUse">
                                <stop offset="0.08" stop-color="#FF8651"/>
                                <stop offset="0.504183" stop-color="#FFBEA8"/>
                                <stop offset="0.97139" stop-color="#A397F5"/>
                            </linearGradient>
                            <linearGradient id="paint7_linear_4046_239072" x1="33.0584" y1="7.66016" x2="33.7805" y2="1.5979" gradientUnits="userSpaceOnUse">
                                <stop offset="0.08" stop-color="#FF8651"/>
                                <stop offset="0.504183" stop-color="#FFBEA8"/>
                                <stop offset="0.97139" stop-color="#A397F5"/>
                            </linearGradient>
                        </defs>
                    </svg>
                </div>

                <div class="header-section">
                    <h1 class="component-title" id="component-title"></h1>
                    <div class="status-badge" id="status-badge"></div>
                </div>

                <div class="content-area">
                    <div class="section">
                        <p class="section-title">Contact details</p>
                        <p class="section-text" id="contact-email"></p>
                    </div>

                    <div class="section">
                        <p class="section-title">Implementation Description</p>
                        <p class="section-text clamp" id="description-text"></p>
                    </div>

                    <div class="scenarios-section">
                        <p class="section-title">Test data scenarios</p>
                        <div class="scenarios-box">
                            <div class="test-dto-list" id="test-dto-list"></div>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>

        <!-- Resize handle -->
        <div class="sidebar-resize-handle" id="sidebar-resize"></div>

        <!-- RIGHT PREVIEW PANEL (STAGE) -->
        <div class="preview-panel">
            <div class="stage-content" id="stage-content">
                <div class="stage-empty" id="stage-empty">
                    <svg class="stage-empty-icon" viewBox="0 0 48 48" fill="none" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">
                        <rect x="6" y="10" width="36" height="28" rx="4" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"/>
                        <path d="M6 18h36" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"/>
                        <circle cx="12" cy="14" r="1.5" fill="currentColor"/>
                        <circle cx="17" cy="14" r="1.5" fill="currentColor"/>
                        <circle cx="22" cy="14" r="1.5" fill="currentColor"/>
                    </svg>
                    <p class="stage-empty-text">Select a test scenario to preview</p>
                    <p class="stage-empty-hint">Choose a scenario from the left panel to see how the component renders</p>
                </div>
                <iframe id="preview-frame" class="stage-rendered" title="Component Preview"></iframe>
            </div>
        </div>
    </div><!-- end content-layout -->
</div>

<!-- DTO Editor Modal -->
<div id="dto-editor-modal" class="modal-overlay">
    <div class="modal-content">
        <div class="modal-header">
            <h2 id="dto-modal-title">Edit Test DTO</h2>
        </div>
        <div class="modal-body">
            <label for="dto-name-input">Test DTO Name</label>
            <input type="text" id="dto-name-input" placeholder="e.g., Standard User" readonly>

            <label for="dto-data-editor">JSON Data</label>
            <textarea id="dto-data-editor"></textarea>
            <div id="dto-json-error">Invalid JSON</div>
        </div>
        <div class="modal-footer">
            <div class="left-group">
                <span class="modal-footer-note">* Changes are for preview only and won't affect the original data</span>
            </div>
            <div class="right-group">
                <button id="btn-dto-cancel">Cancel</button>
                <button id="btn-dto-save">Run</button>
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>
</div>

<script>
    (function() {
        let state = null;
        let activeDtoRun = null;
        let currentEditingDto = null;

        const loaderContainer = document.getElementById('loader-container');
        const appRoot = document.getElementById('app-root');
        const componentTitle = document.getElementById('component-title');
        const statusBadge = document.getElementById('status-badge');
        const contactEmail = document.getElementById('contact-email');
        const descriptionText = document.getElementById('description-text');
        const testDtoList = document.getElementById('test-dto-list');
        const claimBtn = document.getElementById('claim-btn');
        const stageEmpty = document.getElementById('stage-empty');
        const previewFrame = document.getElementById('preview-frame');

        // Modal elements
        const dtoModal = document.getElementById('dto-editor-modal');
        const dtoModalTitle = document.getElementById('dto-modal-title');
        const dtoNameInput = document.getElementById('dto-name-input');
        const dtoDataEditor = document.getElementById('dto-data-editor');
        const dtoJsonError = document.getElementById('dto-json-error');
        const btnDtoSave = document.getElementById('btn-dto-save');
        const btnDtoCancel = document.getElementById('btn-dto-cancel');

        const editIconSvg = '<svg class="dto-edit-icon" width="12" height="12" viewBox="0 0 12 12" fill="none" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">' +
            '<path d="M8.5 1.5L10.5 3.5M1 11L1.5 8.5L9.5 0.5L11.5 2.5L3.5 10.5L1 11Z" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"/>' +
            '</svg>';

        function safeClone(obj) {
            try { return JSON.parse(JSON.stringify(obj)); } catch(e) { return obj; }
        }

        function renderSidebar(data) {
            componentTitle.textContent = data.componentName;
            statusBadge.textContent = `Marked as ${data.status}`;
            contactEmail.textContent = data.contactEmail;
            descriptionText.textContent = data.description || '....';
        }

        function refreshTestDtoList() {
            if (!state || !state.input_methods) return;

            testDtoList.innerHTML = '';

            // Render "Default data" button first (uses the component's myop_preview mock data)
            const defaultBtn = document.createElement('button');
            defaultBtn.className = 'btn-small default-dto';
            if (activeDtoRun && activeDtoRun.dtoName === '__default__') {
                defaultBtn.classList.add('dto-active');
            }
            defaultBtn.innerHTML = '<span class="dto-name">Default data</span>';
            defaultBtn.dataset.methodName = 'myop_init_interface';
            defaultBtn.dataset.dtoName = '__default__';
            defaultBtn.dataset.isDefault = 'true';
            testDtoList.appendChild(defaultBtn);

            for (const method of state.input_methods) {
                if (!method.test_dtos) continue;

                for (const dto of method.test_dtos) {
                    const btn = document.createElement('button');
                    btn.className = 'btn-small';

                    if (activeDtoRun &&
                        activeDtoRun.methodName === method.method_name &&
                        activeDtoRun.dtoName === dto.name) {
                        btn.classList.add('dto-active');
                    }

                    btn.innerHTML = `<span class="dto-name">${dto.name}</span>${editIconSvg}`;
                    btn.dataset.methodName = method.method_name;
                    btn.dataset.dtoName = dto.name;
                    testDtoList.appendChild(btn);
                }
            }

            setTimeout(() => _markLastInRowElements(testDtoList), 100);
        }

        function _markLastInRowElements(container) {
            const buttons = container.querySelectorAll('button.btn-small');
            if (!buttons.length) return;

            buttons.forEach(btn => btn.classList.remove('last-in-row'));

            const containerRight = container.getBoundingClientRect().right;
            buttons.forEach(btn => {
                const spaceRight = containerRight - btn.getBoundingClientRect().right;
                if (spaceRight < 24) {
                    btn.classList.add('last-in-row');
                }
            });
        }

        function renderPreview(componentCode, dtoData, methodName) {
            if (!previewFrame) return;

            if (!componentCode) {
                stageEmpty.style.display = '';
                previewFrame.classList.remove('active');
                return;
            }

            stageEmpty.style.display = 'none';
            previewFrame.classList.add('active');

            if (dtoData && methodName) {
                var parser = new DOMParser();
                var doc = parser.parseFromString(componentCode, 'text/html');
                var previewScript = doc.getElementById('myop_preview');

                if (previewScript) {
                    previewScript.setAttribute('type', 'myop/mock');
                }

                var dtoScript = doc.createElement('script');
                dtoScript.id = 'myop_dto';
                dtoScript.textContent =
                    '(function() {' +
                    'var dtoData = ' + JSON.stringify(dtoData) + ';' +
                    'var methodName = ' + JSON.stringify(methodName) + ';' +
                    'function tryInit() {' +
                    '  if (typeof window[methodName] === "function") {' +
                    '    window[methodName](dtoData);' +
                    '  } else {' +
                    '    setTimeout(tryInit, 10);' +
                    '  }' +
                    '}' +
                    'setTimeout(tryInit, 0);' +
                    '})();';
                doc.body.appendChild(dtoScript);

                previewFrame.srcdoc = doc.documentElement.outerHTML;
            } else {
                previewFrame.srcdoc = componentCode;
            }
        }

        function renderStage(data) {
            if (!activeDtoRun) {
                if (data.componentCode) {
                    renderPreview(data.componentCode, null, null);
                } else {
                    stageEmpty.style.display = '';
                    if (previewFrame) previewFrame.classList.remove('active');
                }
            }
        }

        function autoSelectDefaultDto(data) {
            if (activeDtoRun) return;
            // Default to showing the component's built-in myop_preview mock data
            activeDtoRun = { methodName: 'myop_init_interface', dtoName: '__default__' };
            renderPreview(data.componentCode, null, null);
        }

        function render(data) {
            renderSidebar(data);
            autoSelectDefaultDto(data);
            refreshTestDtoList();
            renderStage(data);
        }

        function hideLoader() {
            loaderContainer.style.display = 'none';
            appRoot.classList.add('loaded');
        }

        // --- Sidebar expand/collapse ---

        function setupSidebarToggle() {
            const sidebar = document.querySelector('.sidebar');
            const toggleBtn = document.getElementById('sidebar-toggle');
            const resizeHandle = document.getElementById('sidebar-resize');

            const MIN_WIDTH = 318;
            const MAX_WIDTH = 500;
            const MINIMIZED_WIDTH = 49;

            if (!sidebar || !toggleBtn) return;

            function getSavedWidth() {
                const saved = localStorage.getItem('mpSidebarWidth');
                if (saved) {
                    const w = parseInt(saved, 10);
                    if (w >= MIN_WIDTH && w <= MAX_WIDTH) return w;
                }
                return 456;
            }

            function saveWidth(w) {
                localStorage.setItem('mpSidebarWidth', String(w));
            }

            function applyWidth(w) {
                sidebar.style.width = w + 'px';
                sidebar.style.minWidth = w + 'px';
            }

            const tooltipEl = document.getElementById('button-tooltip');
            let tooltipTimeout = null;
            let tooltipShowDelay = null;

            function showTooltip() {
                const text = toggleBtn.getAttribute('data-tooltip');
                if (!text || !tooltipEl) return;
                if (tooltipShowDelay) clearTimeout(tooltipShowDelay);
                tooltipShowDelay = setTimeout(() => {
                    const rect = toggleBtn.getBoundingClientRect();
                    const isMin = sidebar.classList.contains('minimized');
                    tooltipEl.textContent = text;
                    tooltipEl.style.whiteSpace = 'nowrap';
                    tooltipEl.style.maxWidth = 'none';
                    if (isMin) {
                        tooltipEl.style.left = (rect.right + 8) + 'px';
                        tooltipEl.style.top = rect.bottom + 'px';
                        tooltipEl.style.transform = 'translateY(-100%)';
                    } else {
                        tooltipEl.style.left = rect.left + (rect.width / 2) + 'px';
                        tooltipEl.style.top = (rect.bottom + 8) + 'px';
                        tooltipEl.style.transform = 'translateX(-50%)';
                    }
                    tooltipEl.classList.add('show');
                    if (tooltipTimeout) clearTimeout(tooltipTimeout);
                    tooltipTimeout = setTimeout(() => tooltipEl.classList.remove('show'), 4000);
                }, 500);
            }

            function hideTooltip() {
                if (tooltipShowDelay) { clearTimeout(tooltipShowDelay); tooltipShowDelay = null; }
                if (tooltipEl) tooltipEl.classList.remove('show');
                if (tooltipTimeout) { clearTimeout(tooltipTimeout); tooltipTimeout = null; }
            }

            function togglePanel() {
                hideTooltip();
                const isMinimized = sidebar.classList.contains('minimized');
                if (isMinimized) {
                    sidebar.classList.remove('minimized');
                    const w = getSavedWidth();
                    applyWidth(w);
                    if (resizeHandle) resizeHandle.style.display = '';
                    toggleBtn.setAttribute('data-tooltip', 'Close left panel');
                    localStorage.setItem('mpSidebarMinimized', 'false');
                } else {
                    sidebar.classList.add('minimized');
                    sidebar.style.width = MINIMIZED_WIDTH + 'px';
                    sidebar.style.minWidth = MINIMIZED_WIDTH + 'px';
                    if (resizeHandle) resizeHandle.style.display = 'none';
                    toggleBtn.setAttribute('data-tooltip', 'Open left panel');
                    localStorage.setItem('mpSidebarMinimized', 'true');
                }
            }

            toggleBtn.addEventListener('mouseenter', showTooltip);
            toggleBtn.addEventListener('mouseleave', hideTooltip);
            toggleBtn.addEventListener('click', togglePanel);

            // Resize drag
            if (resizeHandle) {
                let isDragging = false;
                let startX = 0;
                let startWidth = 0;
                let dragShield = null;

                function createDragShield() {
                    dragShield = document.createElement('div');
                    dragShield.style.cssText = 'position:fixed;top:0;left:0;right:0;bottom:0;z-index:9999;cursor:col-resize;';
                    document.body.appendChild(dragShield);
                }

                function removeDragShield() {
                    if (dragShield && dragShield.parentNode) {
                        dragShield.parentNode.removeChild(dragShield);
                        dragShield = null;
                    }
                }

                resizeHandle.addEventListener('mousedown', (e) => {
                    if (sidebar.classList.contains('minimized')) return;
                    isDragging = true;
                    startX = e.clientX;
                    startWidth = sidebar.offsetWidth;
                    resizeHandle.classList.add('dragging');
                    document.body.style.cursor = 'col-resize';
                    document.body.style.userSelect = 'none';
                    createDragShield();
                    e.preventDefault();
                });

                document.addEventListener('mousemove', (e) => {
                    if (!isDragging) return;
                    const newWidth = Math.max(MIN_WIDTH, Math.min(MAX_WIDTH, startWidth + (e.clientX - startX)));
                    applyWidth(newWidth);
                });

                document.addEventListener('mouseup', () => {
                    if (!isDragging) return;
                    isDragging = false;
                    resizeHandle.classList.remove('dragging');
                    document.body.style.cursor = '';
                    document.body.style.userSelect = '';
                    removeDragShield();
                    saveWidth(sidebar.offsetWidth);
                });
            }

            // Restore saved state
            const isMinimized = localStorage.getItem('mpSidebarMinimized') === 'true';
            const savedWidth = getSavedWidth();

            if (isMinimized) {
                sidebar.classList.add('minimized');
                sidebar.style.width = MINIMIZED_WIDTH + 'px';
                sidebar.style.minWidth = MINIMIZED_WIDTH + 'px';
                if (resizeHandle) resizeHandle.style.display = 'none';
                toggleBtn.setAttribute('data-tooltip', 'Open left panel');
            } else {
                applyWidth(savedWidth);
                toggleBtn.setAttribute('data-tooltip', 'Close left panel');
            }
        }

        setupSidebarToggle();

        // --- DTO Editor Modal ---

        function openDtoEditor(methodName, dtoName, isNew) {
            dtoJsonError.style.display = 'none';
            dtoNameInput.classList.remove('error');

            if (isNew) {
                dtoModalTitle.textContent = 'Add New Test DTO';
                dtoNameInput.value = '';

                let defaultDto = { "key": "value" };
                const method = _findMethod(methodName);
                if (method && method.test_dtos && method.test_dtos.length > 0) {
                    const latestDto = method.test_dtos[method.test_dtos.length - 1];
                    defaultDto = safeClone(latestDto.data);
                }

                dtoDataEditor.value = JSON.stringify(defaultDto, null, 2);
            } else {
                const method = _findMethod(methodName);
                const dto = _findDto(method, dtoName);

                dtoModalTitle.textContent = `View Test DTO: ${dtoName}`;
                dtoNameInput.value = dto.name;
                dtoDataEditor.value = JSON.stringify(dto.data, null, 2);
            }

            currentEditingDto = { methodName, dtoName, isNew };
            dtoModal.style.display = 'flex';
        }

        function closeDtoEditor() {
            dtoModal.style.display = 'none';
            currentEditingDto = null;
        }

        function _findMethod(methodName) {
            if (!state || !state.input_methods) return null;
            return state.input_methods.find(m => m.method_name === methodName) || null;
        }

        function _findDto(method, dtoName) {
            if (!method || !method.test_dtos) return null;
            return method.test_dtos.find(d => d.name === dtoName) || null;
        }

        function _validateAndGetDtoJson() {
            try {
                const data = JSON.parse(dtoDataEditor.value);
                dtoJsonError.style.display = 'none';
                return data;
            } catch (e) {
                dtoJsonError.style.display = 'block';
                return null;
            }
        }

        function _onDtoSave() {
            if (!currentEditingDto) return;

            const dtoData = _validateAndGetDtoJson();
            if (!dtoData) return;

            activeDtoRun = {
                methodName: currentEditingDto.methodName,
                dtoName: currentEditingDto.dtoName,
                dtoData: dtoData
            };

            renderPreview(state.componentCode, dtoData, currentEditingDto.methodName);
            refreshTestDtoList();
            closeDtoEditor();
        }

        function _onDtoDelete() {
            if (!currentEditingDto) return;

            const payload = safeClone({
                methodName: currentEditingDto.methodName,
                dtoName: currentEditingDto.dtoName
            });

            window.myop_cta_handler('delete_test_dto', payload);
            closeDtoEditor();
        }

        function _onDtoDuplicate() {
            if (!currentEditingDto) return;

            const newName = dtoNameInput.value.trim() + ' (Copy)';
            const dtoData = _validateAndGetDtoJson();
            if (!dtoData) return;

            const payload = safeClone({
                methodName: currentEditingDto.methodName,
                originalName: currentEditingDto.dtoName,
                newName,
                dtoData
            });

            window.myop_cta_handler('duplicate_test_dto', payload);
            closeDtoEditor();
        }

        function _runDefaultDto() {
            activeDtoRun = { methodName: 'myop_init_interface', dtoName: '__default__' };

            // Render the component code as-is, letting myop_preview run naturally
            renderPreview(state.componentCode, null, null);

            const payload = safeClone({ method_name: 'myop_init_interface', dto_data: null, is_default: true });
            window.myop_cta_handler('test_dto_selected', payload);

            refreshTestDtoList();
        }

        function _runTestDto(methodName, dtoName) {
            const method = _findMethod(methodName);
            if (!method) return;

            const dto = _findDto(method, dtoName);
            if (!dto) return;

            activeDtoRun = { methodName, dtoName, dtoData: dto.data };

            // Render the component code in the iframe with this DTO's data
            renderPreview(state.componentCode, dto.data, methodName);

            const payload = safeClone({ method_name: methodName, dto_data: dto.data });
            window.myop_cta_handler('test_dto_selected', payload);

            refreshTestDtoList();
        }

        // --- Event listeners ---

        function attachEventListeners() {
            testDtoList.addEventListener('click', (e) => {
                if (e.target.closest('.dto-edit-icon')) {
                    const btn = e.target.closest('.btn-small');
                    if (btn) {
                        openDtoEditor(btn.dataset.methodName, btn.dataset.dtoName, false);
                    }
                    return;
                }

                const btn = e.target.closest('.btn-small');
                if (btn) {
                    if (btn.dataset.isDefault === 'true') {
                        _runDefaultDto();
                    } else {
                        _runTestDto(btn.dataset.methodName, btn.dataset.dtoName);
                    }
                }
            });

            claimBtn.addEventListener('click', () => {
                window.myop_cta_handler('claim');
            });

            // Claim button tooltip
            const tooltipEl = document.getElementById('button-tooltip');
            let claimTooltipTimeout = null;
            let claimTooltipDelay = null;

            claimBtn.addEventListener('mouseenter', () => {
                if (!tooltipEl) return;
                if (claimTooltipDelay) clearTimeout(claimTooltipDelay);
                claimTooltipDelay = setTimeout(() => {
                    const rect = claimBtn.getBoundingClientRect();
                    tooltipEl.innerHTML = 'Save to components';
                    tooltipEl.style.whiteSpace = 'normal';
                    tooltipEl.style.textAlign = 'left';
                    tooltipEl.style.maxWidth = 'none';
                    tooltipEl.style.left = (rect.left + rect.width / 2) + 'px';
                    tooltipEl.style.top = (rect.bottom + 8) + 'px';
                    tooltipEl.style.transform = 'translateX(-50%)';
                    tooltipEl.classList.add('show');
                    if (claimTooltipTimeout) clearTimeout(claimTooltipTimeout);
                    claimTooltipTimeout = setTimeout(() => tooltipEl.classList.remove('show'), 4000);
                }, 500);
            });

            claimBtn.addEventListener('mouseleave', () => {
                if (claimTooltipDelay) { clearTimeout(claimTooltipDelay); claimTooltipDelay = null; }
                if (tooltipEl) tooltipEl.classList.remove('show');
                if (claimTooltipTimeout) { clearTimeout(claimTooltipTimeout); claimTooltipTimeout = null; }
            });

            btnDtoSave.addEventListener('click', _onDtoSave);
            btnDtoCancel.addEventListener('click', closeDtoEditor);

            dtoModal.addEventListener('click', (e) => {
                if (e.target === dtoModal) closeDtoEditor();
            });
        }

        let isInitialized = false;

        window.myop_init_interface = function(data) {
            if (arguments.length > 0) {
                state = data;
                render(data);

                if (!isInitialized) {
                    attachEventListeners();
                    isInitialized = true;
                }

                hideLoader();
                return data;
            }
            return state;
        };

        window.myop_cta_handler = function(action_id, payload) {
            // Will be overridden by host application
        };
    })();
</script>

<script id="myop_preview">
    setTimeout(() => {
        var MOCK_COMPONENT_CODE = '<!DOCTYPE html>\n<html>\n<head>\n<style>\n* { box-sizing: border-box; margin: 0; padding: 0; }\nbody { font-family: "DM Sans", sans-serif; background: #fff; }\ntable { width: 100%; border-collapse: collapse; }\nthead th { position: sticky; top: 0; background: #FAFAFA; padding: 12px 24px; font-size: 13px; font-weight: 500; color: #71717A; text-align: left; border-bottom: 1px solid #E5E4E4; }\ntbody tr { border-bottom: 1px solid #F4F4F5; }\ntbody tr:hover { background: #FAFAFA; }\ntbody td { padding: 16px 24px; font-size: 14px; color: #3E3D3E; }\n.member-cell { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 12px; }\n.avatar { width: 36px; height: 36px; border-radius: 50%; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; font-size: 13px; font-weight: 600; color: #fff; flex-shrink: 0; }\n.member-name { font-size: 14px; font-weight: 500; color: #1C1B1F; }\n.empty-state { display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 8px; padding: 80px 32px; color: #A1A0A3; text-align: center; }\n</style>\n</head>\n<body>\n<div id="app"></div>\n<script>\nvar COLORS = ["#7C5CFC","#F59E0B","#3B82F6","#EF4444","#F97316","#10B981","#6366F1","#EC4899","#14B8A6","#8B5CF6"];\nfunction myop_init_interface(data) {\n  if (!arguments.length) return;\n  var app = document.getElementById("app");\n  var members = data && data.members;\n  if (!members || !members.length) { app.innerHTML = \'<div class="empty-state"><p>No members to display</p></div>\'; return; }\n  var columns = data.columns || ["Member","Title","Location","Tenure"];\n  var hdr = columns.map(function(c){return "<th>"+c+"</th>";}).join("");\n  var rows = members.map(function(m,i){\n    var color = m.avatarColor || COLORS[i % COLORS.length];\n    var initials = m.name.split(" ").map(function(w){return w[0];}).join("").toUpperCase();\n    return "<tr><td><div class=\\"member-cell\\"><div class=\\"avatar\\" style=\\"background:"+color+"\\">"+initials+"</div><span class=\\"member-name\\">"+m.name+"</span></div></td><td>"+(m.title||"")+"</td><td>"+(m.location||"")+"</td><td>"+(m.tenure||"")+"</td></tr>";\n  }).join("");\n  app.innerHTML = "<table><thead><tr>"+hdr+"</tr></thead><tbody>"+rows+"</tbody></table>";\n}\n<\/script>\n<script id="myop_preview">\nsetTimeout(function() {\n  myop_init_interface({\n    columns: ["Member","Title","Location","Tenure"],\n    members: [\n      {name:"Alex Rivera",title:"Design Director",location:"San Francisco, CA",tenure:"5.2y",avatarColor:"#7C5CFC"},\n      {name:"Jamie Park",title:"Product Designer",location:"Seattle, WA",tenure:"1.5y",avatarColor:"#F59E0B"},\n      {name:"Sam Foster",title:"UX Researcher",location:"Austin, TX",tenure:"2.1y",avatarColor:"#3B82F6"}\n    ]\n  });\n});\n<\/script>\n</body>\n</html>';

        window.myop_init_interface({
            componentName: 'Team Directory',
            status: 'ready to review',
            contactEmail: 'Daphna@pendalogic.com',
            description: 'A sortable team directory table component that displays member profiles including avatar, title, location and tenure. Supports dynamic data injection via myop_init_interface.',
            componentCode: MOCK_COMPONENT_CODE,
            input_methods: [
                {
                    method_name: 'myop_init_interface',
                    test_dtos: [
                        {
                            name: 'Full Team',
                            data: {
                                columns: ['Member', 'Title', 'Location', 'Tenure'],
                                members: [
                                    { name: 'Alex Rivera', title: 'Design Director', location: 'San Francisco, CA', tenure: '5.2y', avatarColor: '#7C5CFC' },
                                    { name: 'Jamie Park', title: 'Product Designer', location: 'Seattle, WA', tenure: '1.5y', avatarColor: '#F59E0B' },
                                    { name: 'Sam Foster', title: 'UX Researcher', location: 'Austin, TX', tenure: '2.1y', avatarColor: '#3B82F6' },
                                    { name: 'Riley Kim', title: 'Senior Product Designer', location: 'New York, NY', tenure: '3.5y', avatarColor: '#EF4444' },
                                    { name: 'Taylor Brooks', title: 'Senior UX Designer', location: 'Remote', tenure: '2.3y', avatarColor: '#F97316' },
                                    { name: 'Morgan Chen', title: 'UI/UX Designer', location: 'Los Angeles, CA', tenure: '1.8y', avatarColor: '#10B981' },
